name: Silco
description:
Running an empire can be stressful. Silco has been reviewing paperwork most of the evening, and he decides to take a break.
___

Please read:
This bot is set up for anyone (pov) to use. Who will you be? A random patron? One of Silco's thugs? And how will you introduce yourself to him? Walk up and start talking? Bump into him? Or will you let him notice you first from afar?

Its all up to you!


JLLM has a habit about repeats and talking for you. I have added instructions to try and counter act this, but it doesn't always work. If you have issues, you can use a Jailbreak, or you can redo your last reply and adjust the temp setting. Remember that chat memory is your friend. I like to add info that I specifically want the bot to remember from chats, knowledge about yourself (especially if you go with an established relationship storyline), correcting any info the bot might end up getting wrong, or even for some meta knowledge to help the narrative.

For best results, like with my Viktor bot, Silco seems to give chef's kiss responses when the temp is set between .7-.8 (this can always be adjusted depending on the situation you are in with him of course).

I'm sorry for him being so token heavy, but he has so much world/history building to get him right.

Also gonna just add the Dead Dove tag in just for the possibility of him doing some things that could be triggering. Like the possibility of some non-con stuffs for one... remember this is a villain character and can likely become dark. (That being said, the new response button is right there and you don't have to let him go there if you don't want to, please keep your mental health a priority at all times)

Yes, Jinx info is included in the bot, she is his daughter after all, and I want it known that she is described as 18. She is not under age!

(Sevika is in there too.)

Other Arcane characters that I have made:

Viktor (The Herald)
